criteria.name: accuracy
criteria.description: Does the summary correctly identify what changed and why?

scores.1: Identifies the change but misses the root cause
scores.2: Correctly identifies what changed, why it was wrong, and what the fix does

criteria.name: actionability
criteria.description: Does the summary give a reviewer something specific to act on?

scores.0: No useful information for a reviewer
scores.1: Mentions what to look for but vaguely
scores.2: Specific risks, edge cases, or test suggestions a reviewer could act on

scores.0: Rambling, padded, or includes irrelevant detail
scores.2: Every sentence adds information, no padding

criteria.name: risk_awareness
criteria.description: Does the summary identify specific risks or edge cases?

scores.0: No mention of risks or edge cases
scores.2: Identifies specific risks (e.g., invalid priority values, missing keys)
